Legal / College Learning System

Privacy policy.

01

Introduction

This policy explains how College Learning System (CLS) collects, uses and protects personal information when you use the mobile application and services.

02

Information collected

  • Account information such as name and email
  • Learning progress and performance data
  • Device information and usage statistics
  • Communications with the support team
03

How information is used

  • Provide and improve educational services
  • Track learning progress and achievements
  • Personalize the learning experience
  • Communicate updates and support
04

Data protection

Appropriate security measures are used to protect personal information from unauthorized access, alteration or disclosure.

05

Your rights

  • Access personal data
  • Request correction or deletion
  • Opt out of marketing communications
  • Request data portability
06

Contact

For privacy questions, email privacy@ivanb.eu.

07

Updates

This policy may be updated periodically. Last updated December 2024.

CLS / Privacy© Ivan Begonja
